'''Sith pincerbugs''' were [[Arthropod/Legends|arthropods]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]. Their burning venom was used during the initiation of a new [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] to burn the [[Mark of Dark Lord of the Sith|Dark Lord's mark]] on his forehead.<ref name="gaots4" />

==Behind the scenes==
While these creatures are [[canon]], they were never actually named.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 4]] {{1st}}
